subcodes.first_line: We desire to make mention of those who have hearkened unto the Call of God, that they may arise to that which befitteth this wondrous Day and make mention of their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اردنا ان نذکر من سمع ندآء الله لیقوم علی ما ینبغی لهذا الیوم البدیع و یذکر مولاه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude
